$schema: Per-product port allocation. Each product gets a unique 10-port slot to avoid host port collisions when multiple products run docker-compose simultaneously on the same WSL host.
$convention: Add new products with the next available offset. Offset 0 = base (5432). Offset 1 = base+10 (5442). Reserved range: 5432-5532, 9000-9100, 1025-1125, 8025-8125.
